positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest fauna scene. Central subject features a majestic, bioluminescent owl perched on a glowing branch, surrounded by whimsical, stylized fox spirits and crystalline flora. The composition should be highly symmetrical and graphic, utilizing bold, deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with bright neon-glow accents. The art style must be inspired by Art Nouveau graphic design, but executed with modern, crisp digital vector aesthetics. Focus on clean, impactful silhouettes, strong black outlines, and intricate, repetitive patterns suitable for repeat textile printing. The background should be dark, deep indigo or midnight blue, making the glowing subjects pop with dramatic luminescence. Perfect for apparel transfer print.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, low resolution, fuzzy, noise, text, writing, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, grayscale, washed out
